reviews.review_title: Best vr app plus it is free
reviews.review_description: Thank you i could spend allday in here its like an instragram but 1m× better its so real with amazing videos. The free version gives you 60seconds on each movie what is enough for most the free 10 minutes a day is were they give you a full 10minutes of premium with full access once them 10minutes are over you can carry on allday watching short 60 second clips for free. My only negative  is the subscription price £7.99 a month if it was £3..99 - £4.99 i would subscribe to premium. Apart from that for me this app is perfect thank you

So many BEAUTIFUL and unique videos.  This is nice to come to after playing a game and wanting to simply chill and get lost in a relaxing way.  I end up spending WAY too much time but what a treat.  I also like the category option to avoid what we don't want to see.

Would be good to have below filters, similar to YouTube -
1. New to you (recently updated)
2. Already watched 
3. Trending videos

Other Notes -

1. Also, videos that we watch, it should save the progress of video
2. Videos that we follow, should show as a green creator icon or blue when we see in search windows

developer_response.body:
Hi~pinno,
Thanks so much for these valuable suggestions—we really appreciate you taking the time to share them:)
We’ll definitely consider them as we continue improving the platform.

reviews.review_description:

Does nobody check whats added / is there even any security to what is added for strangers / children to come across when on the app.

reviews.review_title: They charged me days after cancellation!
reviews.review_description:
I clicked on a trial for this app and the trial was canceled. Two days later after canceling the trial, they charged me $71 for an annual subscription even though I have email confirmations that it was canceled. I was told by a Meta representative that the charge would not be reversed unless it came from Photon themselves. 

Earlier today I spoke with Bank of America to reverse the charge and have Photon blocked. I also spoke with Apple Pay and had Photon blocked. No customers should have to go through this for clicking on a trial.￼ I will never ever purchase another Photon product, ever. ￼

These people are clearly trying to take advantage, & money from customers that chooses to cancel their trials. It’s ridiculous and something needs to be done about it. ￼

developer_response.body:
Hi,

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. Please rest assured that we strictly adhere to Meta Quest's policies; we never attempt to—nor do we have the technical capability to—collect payments after an unsubscription.

We were previously unaware of this matter, but we are more than willing to help you resolve it. Because all billing and refunds are managed exclusively by Meta, we cannot initiate the refund from our end.

Please contact Meta Store Support directly and let them know you were charged after canceling. If you are still charged despite having cancelled your subscription in advance, we are inclined to believe this is an issue on Meta's end.

If Meta requires any verification or support from our side to process your refund, please let us know.

Please feel free to reach out to me directly at: mason@interdime.io. We are here to help!

Best regard,
Mason

reviews.review_description: This platform looks absolutely stunning and everything works incredibly smooth. We are super happy to share our travel vlogs here! By the way – is anyone already watching our videos here? Let us know what you think! 🗺️🎬

It worked fine 6 hours ago, but after today’s v2.7.3 update it now stays on an infinite loading screen. My trial is almost over; if this update broke it and it cannot be fixed quickly, I want a refund. I like the app and AI content is fine, but real quality content feels limited despite “100k+ videos.” If more good content comes and updates stop breaking it, I’d keep paying for ad-free.

Some of the content is fantastic, most of it though is typical of social media these days… AI slop, stolen movie clips, lots of Asian girls in revealing outfits, or Asian girls dancing, women doing try on hauls of skimpy outfits as a way to promote their OnlyFans page (though they don’t directly mention it by name).
The video quality varies from just okay to stunning. Some of the 8K travel stuff is amazing to see.
What’s desperately needed though is a way to cut through the sludge to get to the good stuff. There are only 8 random categories to choose listed at the top. One is very specific -- kpop(!) -- and the others are too generic in their meaning. More specific categories are needed.
Some sort of user rating system is needed, allowing us to zero in on the popular videos. That would allow users to cut through the cruft and encourage content creators to output better product.
There is a separate search function which I think searches on the titles. But,unless you use the exact same term as the content creator, you might not find their stuff even if it is something you would probably like. I tried searching on ‘8k’ and got nothing, but ‘8K’ generated some hits. 
The UI needs improvement in other ways as well.
For example, depending on how you dive into the videos, you can’t get back to the front page immediately. You have to back-button your way past the videos you’ve already watched.
There is a menu that sometimes appears on the left, but it doesn’t follow good UI practice.
For example, the Home Page button takes you back to the first video that greeted you when you opened the app. This seems to be some video chosen at random.
Meanwhile, the Search symbol takes you to a page full of video thumbnails and the search input bar. This isn’t good design practice. Normally, a page such as this would be the landing page or home page, similar to Youtube.
This app has been around for a year lately, so I’m surprised it’s as clunky as it is.
I will re-visit it in a half year

Hi when i try to subscribe to the free 7 days trial I have to get verification from my bank which is fine but the bank is asking me to confirm the full subscription for the year of £46.99. I fear if I verify, the full years subscription will be taken from my account instead  of £00.00 for 7 days free trial. Therfore I rejected it.

reviews.review_title: This is a definite must have
reviews.review_description:
All I can say is WOW.  The videos are on another level. It compares to the videos on the Apple more expensive headset.  I could not believe this could be pulled off on a Quest headset.

I love 3d videos, and they are hard to find on the Quest. At least, they used to be.  


I would definitely pay money to keep the app going.   


Great job, developers!!!!
I stumbled across this app thanks to gingasvr. I wasnt sure what to expect but I found it to be very cool and awesome. Lots of unique video experiences. Lol

It used to be one of my favorite apps. It still has the potential to be great, but I’m honestly fed up with the flood of cheap porn and AI-generated garbage. At this point, maybe 20% of the content is actually worth seeing—and that’s being generous. It feels like no one is even trying to moderate or improve the platform anymore. Sadly, it’s turned into a complete waste of time and just isn’t worth using.

This app has potential but the content isnt for everyone. Unfortunately there seems to be no algorithm so everytime i open it, it auto plays some video i dont want to see. I wish they would stop pushing nsfw content. Not everyone on vr wants to see that. Do not let your kids use this app. Otherwise the effect on vides is cool. But the current content is bad.

Why are people claiming this is free ? Its not unless you count 10 minutes a day ,Now for the app itself whilst only able to spend 10 minutes in it I liked it  in fact I liked It a lot Video is crisp content various and abundant and I can see this app being a big success if not for the subscription  charge, considering the content is coming from the users why a monthly fee ? Just charge us a one off fee and let us use it at will .

For weeks now I have been attempting to subscribe to the Plus version. It appears that the only way to do this is via the popup that appears when one has used up the daily allowance. However,  all goes ewell until the bit where it contacts my bank for verification - at which point it cannot complete. Visa and my bank confirm that all is well their end, but still no joy. Any thoughts?
for a showcase of what 3d looks like this cant be beat, so much variety too!

Didn’t expect much but wow. The sharpening and rendering here is miles ahead of what Meta gives you out of the box. Watched some 180 stuff and I’m actually seeing details I missed before. It’s buttery smooth on my Q3. If you care about bitrates, this is the one. Period.

I've been using Photon for almost a year and haven't left a review before. I hope people won't be misled by extreme users who casually give one or two-star bad reviews just based on personal preferences. The minimalist UI is very close to Vision Pro, and the content is abundant. Even if there are video types you don't like, you can always go to the Discover /Search page to find content that interests you.

developer_response.body:
Hi~ Tree.lee.2046,
Thank you so much for your thoughtful review and for being with Photon for nearly a year — it truly means a lot to us.❤️❤️❤️

reviews.review_description:
High quality app for enjoying high resolution,  3D and also fully immersive content. Lots of upconverteds that just blow your eyes out. What is needed most is more original content and for content creators not to have their stuff boosted from other sources without permission. 

Anyway, this app showcases the power of immersion in VR far better than most. Worth downloading, and I even subscribed. 

To the devs:  PLEASE contine to encourage and support artists, as well as helping make artists out of all of us who would like to explore this medium as a vehicle for our own creativity. 

 I almost never pay for subscriptions in VR, but this app's potential has earned it.

developer_response.body:
Hi~@cieldumort,
Thank you so much for your thoughtful feedback and for subscribing — we truly appreciate your support!

We agree with you on the importance of original content and properly supporting creators. To address this, we’ve launched a Creator Incentive Program designed to encourage and reward original artists for sharing their high-quality work with the community.

Thank you again for believing in the potential of the Photon— we’re excited to keep building and improving it with you.

reviews.review_description: Yes it's free. Maybe.\nCause I've had it for a while.I downloaded it when it was totally free.But I didn't pay a goddamn thing and I can watch a lot more in 10 minutes a day.I'll tell you that cause I watch a lot more than ten minutes a day

reviews.review_title: Best PLAYER on the store right now.
reviews.review_description: Honestly, I’ve been waiting for a player that doesn't stutter when handling high-bitrate 8K files. Photon actually delivers. The UI is minimalist and doesn't feel like a cheap mobile port from 2018. If you’re tired of the janky stock players, this is the one.

This is one of my favorite apps on all of horizon. I use it daily and it’s usually the first app that I open. I always love to check the featured video and then new uploads from the favorites that I follow. If you use their website, there are also feature features to turn your own 2-D videos into 3-D videos and upload them to the app to share with others
It felt like on i Was Actually  there when I Zoomed it out And put it close to my face
Good app
fantastic app
I love this app, 8K, 3D, everything you need and crystal clear, can't get enough of this app!!

reviews.review_description: This is what VR should feel like. The moment things step out of the screen changes everything. Thank you for this update.
endless escape. you don't need a reason just enjoy

Honestly? Just buy it. If you’re into high-res immersive stuff, this makes everything look 10x better. No more annoying audio-sync crap. It just works, which is more than I can say for most apps on this store. Massive props to the devs.
This is basically TikTok for VR.

reviews.review_title: The best money i have ever spent
reviews.review_description: This app i fantastic. Fell instantly in love and the videos are so immersing and gorgeous. 10 out of 10.

I had been running it for months no problems,now afer the latest update it seems to have loading problems and is now limiting my watchtime which never used to happen before
Please fix it as it was.
i fully recomend this app

Hey guys, the clarity in this app is insane! Just watched some 180° footage and it’s the first time I didn't feel like I was looking through a screen door. It just... works. No crashing, no weird audio sync issues. If you have a Quest 3, you NEED to see how this handles high-res content. Total night and day difference.
Love it! Great verity of 3d vedio! Just wondering if they will put movies?

Please add an option to lower the brightness on the controllers. Even with brightness at its lowest and night mode on they're too distracting ! I understand with tracking  on ,they can be tapped to turn off and hand tracking could be used also but. Not ideal. Otherwise great app but wanna see more updates and more creator uploads! A more refined way to back out to the home as well. I cant believe more haven't been unhappy with the controllers though?  Thank you very much for the quick response . Yes I believe one of the unused buttons held to bring up the home,search tab UI While watching a clip would work well. It sometimes appears clicking right trigger but not usually.

developer_response.body:
Hi~AstroPat16A,

Thank you very much for your feedback! We really appreciate your suggestion, and we’ve already implemented it in the latest version.

In VR180 mode, pressing the A button will now hide both the UI and the controllers, helping reduce distractions while watching.

As for hiding the controllers in non-VR180 modes, we still need to do some additional testing and exploration to see what works best :)

reviews.review_description: What an amazing app to show off the vr headset
I’ve been looking for a solid player for my Spatial Videos, and Photon nails it. The depth is crystal clear and the UI stays out of the way.
This alone makes the Quest 3 worth it for me. Some really breathtaking immersive and spatial video on here. I visit the app most days.
I was surprised by how much high-quality VR180 content is available right out of the box. The streaming quality is top-tier.
The UI is so stripped back and elegant. It feels like a native part of the OS. No bloat, just pure performance.

reviews.review_title: The best way to relive memorie！
reviews.review_description: I imported my iPhone Spatial Videos and was blown away. The depth and clarity in Photon are noticeably better than the native player！
The way the light spills out of the screen and hits the floor and ceiling is incredible. It makes the 'virtual wall' disappear.

reviews.review_description: Nice collections of 3d videos

reviews.review_title: How on earth can I subscribe?
reviews.review_description: I have used this great app on the Meta Quest 3 and have to admit to a high degree of confusion, can I view everything for free? can I post videoes that I have converted on the website ? Why am I confused ? Shouldn't it be easy to subscribe?  Gosh I am frustrated with this. Thanks for your help.

developer_response.body:
Hi~ @Marvo2024,
Thank you very much for your feedback, and we’re sorry for the confusion.

Photon Plus unlocks unlimited viewing time, which means you can watch videos uploaded by other creators without any time limits. Even without a Photon Plus subscription, you can still watch up to 10 minutes of content for free each day. After reaching this limit, you’ll be able to watch only the first minute of each video for the rest of the day.

You can also upload videos on our website (photon-xr.com), and watching the videos you upload yourself is completely free with no viewing time limits.

If you have any other questions or need further assistance, please feel free to contact us anytime at: mason@interdime.io

reviews.review_description: This a of 3d video flipper.
If you use your headset for media consumption, this is a must-buy. The lighting engine alone is worth it.
Its great for viewing 3D game and movie trailers, music videos, anime clips, etc. I got the annual subscription just so I can watch without daily limits, and Im loving it.
Exelent app. Use it all the time.
This app has some really impressive immersive videos. I keep coming back to it every day for a few minutes. Highly recommended.
Only thng i would love to see is some streaming service access
Awsome to just sit and relax watching imersive video, so much to choose from.
Photon is the first video platform that makes me feel no disconnect from watching videos on my phone or computer in daily life when viewing content in VR/MR.

reviews.review_description:
I downloaded the app last year and I'm not sure what happened. I recently registered a new account on photon-xr and linked my Meta account. Since doing that, I can now only watch the first minute of videos. Before this, I was able to watch the full videos without any issues
-----
Thank you for your reply. I have tried deleting my photon-xr account, as well as deleting and reinstalling the app. However, the system still recognizes me as a new account.

developer_response.body:
Hi~@jameswoo7929,

Thank you for your feedback.
Currently, accounts that registered with Photon before the end of December 2025 can watch all videos for free without any time limit.

For accounts registered after that date, there is a daily free quota of 10 minutes. After the free quota is used, each video can only be watched for the first minute.

If you would like to enjoy unlimited viewing time, we recommend logging into Photon on your Meta Quest device using the Meta account you used previously.

reviews.review_description: It's a brilliant app. So immersive. Well worth adding to my media.
I find it rewarding to surf everytime. I recomend it highly.
Would like to see a watch history, playlist functionality, and more robust search. Off to a good start.
Why is there a charge? The videos are all uploaded by users, how can you profit from users' videos? No streaming software has ever required a subscription to use.

developer_response.body:
Hello deemo.2026, we're sorry for your experience and understand your concern.

We do offer a free plan! You can use Photon for free with 10 minutes of unlimited watch time every day and freely watch every video for the first minutes afterwards.

A large portion of the subscription is distributed to our creators so the content ecosystem can grow. Your subscription is supporting the creators and investing in the future of Photon!

reviews.review_description: It's a good thing to be free for ten minutes every day, otherwise you will be addicted to it.We call him electronic drugs.

If you’ve only seen Photon demos in other people’s screen recordings, you might not feel the difference from other video apps. But once you try it, you’ll understand that Photon is currently the best in its category apps.

developer_response.body:
Hi~@meyang.438565,

Photon is a little bit hard to judge from recordings — the real experience happens inside the headset.

reviews.review_title: Keeps asking to pay despite free trial
reviews.review_description:
I got this on my Quest 3, i enjoy some of the videos, the paywall popped, I found out there is a 3 days free trial, I activated it, went back to my Quest and the paywall keeps popping up, like I don't have premium.

I already tried reopening and fully reinstalling app, same thing.

So the 3 day free trial is a lie or what?

developer_response.body:
Hi~@BastianSuivera,
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. The three-day free trial you mentioned may be for Photon Premium, a different subscription plan from Photon Plus. 

Photon Premium is geared towards creators who upload private, longer videos (uploading and watching your own uploaded videos is totally free, but each video has a 10-minute time limit). 

At the same time, Photon Plus is designed for users who enjoy browsing videos.
We apologize again for this confusion, and we will make the differences between the two plans clearer in the future.

By the way, you can click "don't show again today" the next time the pop-up window appears to avoid being bothered by it again :)

Please feel free to join our Discord:https://discord.com/invite/KdcpT6msXc

reviews.review_description: One of the things that bothered me about owning a VR headset was the lack of 3D content and difficulty accessing it. Video is so much more immersive now with Photon and it makes it accessible and available to anyone without needing a fancy 3D camera. I've been uploading a few 2D clips I took from recent concerts I've attended and it feels like I'm right back there!
